creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Alexey,

Does the build fail on a system without IPv6 support?
If so, please provide build logs.

Does leafnode fail during run-time on a system without IPv6 support?
If so, please provide run-time logs.

Leafnode is designed so that it should build and/or run properly on a
system without IPv6 support by using the protocol-agnostic functions;
but this is very hard to test, so please help (and state how exactly you
disable IPv6 on your computer).

Best regards,
Matthias
